strategy_used: Graph Strategy: We have no data yet about what is driving Bitcoin price movement today. The highest-priority gaps are (1) what real-time tweets or breaking statements are circulating now that could move BTC, (2) whether Bitcoin is appearing in the day’s trending topics, and (3) what authoritative crypto news accounts and major influencers have posted today. The next round should therefore (A) capture the latest tweet-level signals about BTC, (B) check trending topic context, and (C) pull recent posts and profile metadata for high-impact accounts so we can verify credibility and then deep-dive into any candidate tweets/threads. To satisfy the mandate to use diverse endpoints and to produce complementary results, I propose targeted search queries, trend checks, and profile/timeline pulls. These will produce candidate tweet IDs and accounts for follow-up conversation and network analysis in the next round.
